name: Processor Parmesan Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease a 9x9x2-inch pan; set aside.
3. Pulse the flours, baking powder, soda, sugar, marjoram, rosemary, salt, and pepper in a food processor fitted with a metal chopping blade several times to combine.
4. Add butter and pulse until uniformly crumbly and texture is coarse meal-like.
5. Add Parmesan and pulse three to four times.
6. Transfer the mixture to a large bowl and make a well in the center.
7. Pulse buttermilk and eggs in the processor until foamy, then pour into the well of dry ingredients.
8. Stir just enough to form a stiff dough.
9. Spoon the batter into the pan, spreading it to the corners.
10. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until springy to touch.
11. Cool for 10 minutes in the pan on a wire rack.
12. Cut into squares and serve warm.
